queries.question: What clubs and leadership programs have 30 participants?
queries.sql:
SELECT Clubs.name
FROM Clubs
WHERE Clubs.Participants = 30
UNION
SELECT LeadershipPrograms.name
FROM LeadershipPrograms
WHERE LeadershipPrograms.Participants = 30

queries.question: List all clubs and also display leadership programs with 30 participants.
queries.sql:
SELECT Clubs.name
FROM Clubs
UNION
SELECT LeadershipPrograms.name
FROM LeadershipPrograms
WHERE LeadershipPrograms.Participants = 30

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display clubs and leadership programs with 30 participants.
